No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CARGOBARN INC.'s Motion For Assignment Order is Off calendar. Plaintiff did not serve the application at least 16 court days before the hearing, as required by Code of Civil Procedure section 1005(b) (including five days for service by mail).

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-04-2018 Off Calendar

Motion For Entry Of Prove-Up Hearing Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-24-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Speakeasy Ales & Lagers, Inc., fka Brewmaster, Inc., dba Speakeasy Ales & Lagers, aka Speakeasy Ales and Lagers, aka Speakeasy Brewery.
Dept. 514. Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Gena Eales, CSR 176. Telephone: 406-381-9176.

Daniel Frankston, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Cargobarn, Inc., a corporation.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Speakeasy Ales & Lagers, Inc., fka Brewmaster, Inc., dba Speakeasy Ales & Lagers, aka Speakeasy Ales and Lagers, aka Speakeasy Brewery.
Plaintiff's complaint was filed on June 26, 2017.
Default was entered against defendant on September 19, 2017.
DOE defendants were dismissed on September 19, 2017.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on April 10, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Cargobarn, Inc., a corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendant Speakeasy Ales & Lagers, Inc., fka Brewmaster, Inc., dba Speakeasy Ales & Lagers, aka Speakeasy Ales and Lagers, aka Speakeasy Brewery, as follows:

Damages - $44,089.26.
Prejudgment Interest - $8,660.82.
Attorney Fees - $1,200.00.
Costs - $515.00.

Total - $54,465.08.

Proposed judment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Motion For Entry Of Prove-Up Hearing Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-09-2018 Continued To Apr-24-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
